summary: Vertical video. A narrated USCIS PSA ('Who should register?') citing the Immigration and Nationality Act and Trump's executive order. It opens on a vintage INA statute document, then cuts to a DHS flag, a fingerprint, and a classroom under a voiceover with white caption text and an ARR logo and URL end card. The narration lays out the registration criteria and a penalty statement. On-screen and spoken text includes 'Immigration and Nationality', 'by the Senate and... of America in Congress', 'is making sure all aliens comply', 'when you applied for a U.S. visa', 'you need to make sure they register too', 'ARR Alien Registration Requirement', and 'FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION'.
notable_text: Immigration and Nationality; by the Senate and... of America in Congress; is making sure all aliens comply; when you applied for a U.S. visa; you need to make sure they register too; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
